content.text: Creating a read-only zip of `~/.openclaw` now. I won’t modify the directory.

content.name: exec

arguments.command:
set -e
src="$HOME/.openclaw"
out="$HOME/openclaw-directory-2026-04-22.zip"
if [ ! -d "$src" ]; then
  echo "SOURCE_MISSING:$src"
  exit 1
fi
rm -f "$out"
if command -v zip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cd "$HOME"
  zip -r "$out" .openclaw >/tmp/openclaw_zip.log && tail -n 20 /tmp/openclaw_zip.log
else
  python3 - <<'PY'
import os, zipfile
src = os.path.expanduser('~/.openclaw')
out = os.path.expanduser('~/openclaw-directory-2026-04-22.zip')
with zipfile.ZipFile(out, 'w', compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(src):
        for f in files:
            p = os.path.join(root, f)
            arc = os.path.relpath(p, os.path.expanduser('~'))
            z.write(p, arc)
print(out)
PY
fi
ls -lh "$out"
sha256sum "$out"

{"command":"set -e
src="$HOME/.openclaw"
out="$HOME/openclaw-directory-2026-04-22.zip"
if [ ! -d "$src" ]; then
  echo "SOURCE_MISSING:$src"
  exit 1
fi
rm -f "$out"
if command -v zip >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  cd "$HOME"
  zip -r "$out" .openclaw >/tmp/openclaw_zip.log && tail -n 20 /tmp/openclaw_zip.log
else
  python3 - <<'PY'
import os, zipfile
src = os.path.expanduser('~/.openclaw')
out = os.path.expanduser('~/openclaw-directory-2026-04-22.zip')
with zipfile.ZipFile(out, 'w', compression=zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as z:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk(src):
        for f in files:
            p = os.path.join(root, f)
            arc = os.path.relpath(p, os.path.expanduser('~'))
            z.write(p, arc)
print(out)
PY
fi
ls -lh "$out"
sha256sum "$out"","yieldMs":10000,"workdir":"/home/abbu-rpi5/.openclaw/workspace"}
